CustomField.formula:
IF( OR(
ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_1__c, "IAS - SOFTWARE IMAGING & ANALYSIS") , ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_2__c, "IAS - SOFTWARE IMAGING & ANALYSIS") , ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_3__c, "IAS - SOFTWARE IMAGING & ANALYSIS"), INCLUDES(Product_Interest__c, "Imaging Analysis Systems - IAS"), INCLUDES(Product_Line__c, "IAS"), INCLUDES(BD_Product_Family_Interest__c, "33-IAS")),
"TRUE", "FALSE")
CustomField.label: Summary-IAS
